basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Research Associate (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Research Associate (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation for men: Not exceeding 35 years Age relaxation for women: Not exceeding 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. (Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding), M.Sc. (Ag.) in Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding with NET qualified
qualification.details: Ph.D. (Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding) (or) M.Sc. (Ag.) in Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding with NET qualified. Masters Degree in the relevant subject with 1st Division or 60% marks or equivalent overall grade point average with experience in Rice Biotechnology work is highly required of Research Experience as evidence from Service Certificate / Fellowship / Associate ship / Training / publications. All the relevant degrees should be completed in the ICAR accredited University / Colleges.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. Rs.61,000/- + HRA - Rs.67,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: For Ph.D. holders: Rs.67,000/- + HRA per month For M.Sc. (Ag.) holders: Rs.61,000/- + HRA per month
